Bus Timings

Bus 310 Timings Rashidiya Bus Station Parking to Dragon Mart and Back

November 13, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

So, let me tell you about Bus 310 - it’s a real lifesaver in Dubai. This route hooks you up from Rashidiya Bus Station Parking all the way to Dragon Mart. It’s not just for tourists, you know? Locals swear by it too. If you’re trying to get to Dubai Textile City or International City without the hassle, this bus has got your back

The best part? These guys run pretty much all day, and they’re on the ball with their schedule. You won’t be left hanging around forever waiting for the next one to show up.

Route Name 310
Route Description Rashidiya Bus Station Parking - Dragon Mart - Rashidiya Bus Station Parking
Total Distance Approximately 20-30 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 30-50 minutes
Operational Hours 05:30 to 00:53 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3
Official Website RTA Rubai

Download PDF Bus 310

Bus 310 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

Bus 310 operates frequently throughout the day, ensuring convenient travel for passengers. Here are the key timings for the route:

Bus 310 Timetable

To access the full schedule, visit the RTA website or use this link for Bus 310 Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

Traveling on Bus 310 is affordable, with a standard fare of AED 3. Passengers can use Nol cards for payment, which are widely accepted across Dubai’s public transport system. This pricing structure makes Bus 310 a cost-effective option for both regular and occasional travelers, offering value for money with reliable service.

Bus Booking

Currently, Bus 310 does not offer a dedicated online booking service. This app is a useful tool for ensuring timely travel and managing your journey efficiently.

Bus Route

The route of Bus 310 includes the following stops:

  1. Rashidiya Bus Station Parking

  2. Rashidiya Bus Station · 9

  3. Dragon Mart 2 External

  4. Dubai Textile City Main Gate

  5. Dubai Textile City

  6. International City, Lake Entrance

  7. International City, Morocco

  8. International City, China 3

  9. International City, China 2

  10. Dragon Mart

  11. Post Office

  12. Rivera Dreams Apartments

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. CBD Buildings

  2. Civil Defence

  3. International City, Greece

  4. Manama Road, 4

  5. Rashidiya, Street 38

  6. Rashidiya Bus Station, Arrival

  7. Rashidiya Bus Station Parking

The bus makes several key stops at commercial and residential areas, connecting major points of interest and providing a seamless travel experience across Dubai.

Bus 310 Station Overview

Rashidiya Bus Station Parking

The Rashidiya Bus Station Parking is a significant transit point for Bus 310. Located in a well-connected area, this station provides ample parking space for commuters and easy access to nearby public transport services. It features basic amenities such as sheltered waiting areas and ticketing facilities, ensuring a comfortable experience for passengers. Its strategic placement supports efficient travel within the Rashidiya area and offers convenient connections to other bus routes.

l Warsan 1, Eppco 1 Bus Stop Intersection

The Al Warsan 1, Eppco 1 Bus Stop is a key junction where Routes 50, X23, 310, and E16 intersect. This bus stop serves as a vital hub for commuters traveling to and from the Al Warsan area, offering diverse route options that connect to various parts of the city. The intersection of these routes ensures convenient and efficient transit, making it an essential stop for daily travelers and residents.

Dragon Mart

The Dragon Mart station serves as an important stop for Bus 310, situated near one of Dubai’s largest shopping complexes. This station caters to a high volume of shoppers and visitors to Dragon Mart, offering convenient access to the mall’s numerous retail and dining options. Equipped with essential amenities such as seating and real-time schedule updates, it ensures a smooth transit experience for passengers heading to or from this popular commercial hub.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

Bus 310 in Dubai connects several key areas and attractions. Here are some notable destinations along its route:

  1. It’s one of Dubai’s largest and most diverse retail hubs.

2.

  1. International City: This large residential community is designed with themed architecture representing various countries, providing a unique and picturesque environment.

  2. Civil Defence: While not a tourist destination, this location is an important landmark within Dubai.

  3. CBD Buildings: Located in the Central Business District, this area is essential for business and commerce, although it’s not a tourist attraction per se.

These stops provide access to a mix of shopping, cultural, and commercial areas, making Bus 310 a valuable route for both residents and visitors in Dubai.

Journey Experience

Bus Route 310 from Rashidiya Bus Station Parking to Dragon Mart offers a long but intriguing journey through diverse parts of Dubai. Departing from Rashidiya, a primarily residential and tranquil area, the route quickly transitions into busier sections of the city.

Dragon Mart, the largest trading hub for Chinese products outside mainland China, is the highlight of the route. It’s a shopper’s paradise, offering everything from electronics to clothing, making this bus ride not only convenient but also an exploration of Dubai’s multicultural commercial centers.

Travelling with Careem

Using the Careem app, you can conveniently travel to Dragon Mart, the furthest point on the Bus 310 route, starting from Rashidiya Bus Station Parking. The fare for this journey typically ranges between AED 46 and AED 55, offering a straightforward and affordable option for reaching one of Dubai’s largest shopping destinations.

In summary, Bus 310 is a key route in Dubai’s public transport network, linking important locations with frequent and affordable service. Whether you are heading to Dragon Mart or traveling through International City, Bus 310 offers a dependable option for getting around the city. With its extensive route and reliable schedule, it remains an essential choice for both daily commutes and casual trips.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: November 13, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
